methodology.fusion: Adaptive DS (Murphy + PCR5) with Evidence Discounting
methodology.uncertainty: Deng Entropy (generalized Shannon for DS framework)
methodology.features: Multi-scale Information Theory (Shannon, Rényi, Tsallis, KL-Divergence, Kolmogorov)
